rule_metadata.name: hunt_multi_EDR_discovery
rule_metadata.description: Hunting rule for the presence of at least 3 different known EDR driver names, more drivers can be found in the reference link
rule_metadata.author: SBousseaden

rules.rule_text:
rule hunt_multi_EDR_discovery
{
	meta:
		description = "Hunting rule for the presence of at least 3 different known EDR driver names, more drivers can be found in the reference link"
		author = "SBousseaden"
		date = "17/07/2020"
		reference = "https://github.com/harleyQu1nn/AggressorScripts/blob/master/EDR.cna"

	strings:
		$edrB1 = "cbstream.sys" base64
		$edrB2 = "carbonblackk.sys" base64
		$edrB3 = "CyOptics.sys" base64
		$edrB4 = "CyProtectDrv32.sys" base64
		$edrB5 = "CyProtectDrv64.sys" base64
		$edrB6 = "FeKern.sys" base64
		$edrB7 = "WFP_MRT.sys" base64
		$edrB8 = "edevmon.sys" base64
		$edrB9 = "ehdrv.sys" base64
		$edrB10 = "esensor.sys" base64
		$edrB11 = "SentinelMonitor.sys" base64
		$edrB12 = "groundling32.sys" base64
		$edrB13 = "groundling64.sys" base64
		$edrB14 = "CRExecPrev.sys" base64
		$edrB15 = "brfilter.sys" base64
		$edrB16 = "BrCow_x_x_x_x.sys" base64
		$edrB17 = "fsatp.sys" base64
		$edrB18 = "fsgk.sys" base64
		$edrB19 = "CiscoAMPCEFWDriver.sys" base64
		$edrB20 = "CiscoAMPHeurDriver.sys" base64
		$edrBW1 = "cbstream.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW2 = "carbonblackk.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW3 = "CyOptics.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW4 = "CyProtectDrv32.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW5 = "CyProtectDrv64.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW6 = "FeKern.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW7 = "WFP_MRT.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW8 = "edevmon.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW9 = "ehdrv.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW10 = "esensor.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW11 = "SentinelMonitor.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW12 = "groundling32.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW13 = "groundling64.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW14 = "CRExecPrev.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW15 = "brfilter.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW16 = "BrCow_x_x_x_x.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW17 = "fsatp.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW18 = "fsgk.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW19 = "CiscoAMPCEFWDriver.sys" base64 wide
		$edrBW20 = "CiscoAMPHeurDriver.sys" base64 wide
		$edrX1 = "cbstream.sys" xor
		$edrX2 = "carbonblackk.sys" xor
		$edrX3 = "CyOptics.sys" xor
		$edrX4 = "CyProtectDrv32.sys" xor
		$edrX5 = "CyProtectDrv64.sys" xor
		$edrX6 = "FeKern.sys" xor
		$edrX7 = "WFP_MRT.sys" xor
		$edrX8 = "edevmon.sys" xor
		$edrX9 = "ehdrv.sys" xor
		$edrX10 = "esensor.sys" xor
		$edrX11 = "SentinelMonitor.sys" xor
		$edrX12 = "groundling32.sys" xor
		$edrX13 = "groundling64.sys" xor
		$edrX14 = "CRExecPrev.sys" xor
		$edrX15 = "brfilter.sys" xor
		$edrX16 = "BrCow_x_x_x_x.sys" xor
		$edrX17 = "fsatp.sys" xor
		$edrX18 = "fsgk.sys" xor
		$edrX19 = "CiscoAMPCEFWDriver.sys" xor
		$edrX20 = "CiscoAMPHeurDriver.sys" xor
		$edrXW1 = "cbstream.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW2 = "carbonblackk.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW3 = "CyOptics.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW4 = "CyProtectDrv32.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW5 = "CyProtectDrv64.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW6 = "FeKern.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW7 = "WFP_MRT.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW8 = "edevmon.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW9 = "ehdrv.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW10 = "esensor.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW11 = "SentinelMonitor.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW12 = "groundling32.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW13 = "groundling64.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW14 = "CRExecPrev.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW15 = "brfilter.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW16 = "BrCow_x_x_x_x.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW17 = "fsatp.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW18 = "fsgk.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW19 = "CiscoAMPCEFWDriver.sys" xor wide
		$edrXW20 = "CiscoAMPHeurDriver.sys" xor wide

	condition:
		3 of them
}
